targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS files FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id'
SELECT countIf(owner_name LIKE 'S-1-%' OR owner_name='' OR positionCaseInsensitive(owner_name,'unresolv')>0) AS orphans FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id'
SELECT countIf(positionCaseInsensitive(acl,'Everyone')>0) AS every FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id'
SELECT countIf(parent_acl != '' AND acl != parent_acl) AS broken FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id'
SELECT countIf(modified > now()-INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS active FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id'

SELECT owner_sid, any(owner_name) AS sample_name, count() AS files, sum(size) AS bytes, min(modified) AS oldest, max(modified) AS newest FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND (owner_name LIKE 'S-1-%' OR owner_name='' OR positionCaseInsensitive(owner_name,'unresolv')>0) GROUP BY owner_sid ORDER BY bytes DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Orphan SID Worklist — Top by Capacity

targets.rawSql: SELECT replaceRegexpOne(file_path, '([^\\/]+)$', '') AS parent_dir, count() AS files, sum(size) AS bytes FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND positionCaseInsensitive(acl,'Everyone')>0 GROUP BY parent_dir ORDER BY files DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT owner_name, count() AS files FROM symphony.scan_results WHERE run_id='$run_id' GROUP BY owner_name ORDER BY files DESC LIMIT 20

list.name: run_id
list.query: SELECT run_id FROM symphony.scan_results GROUP BY run_id ORDER BY max(run_start_time) DESC
